subcodes.first_line: O ye true friends! Ye well know that in Persia the jealous ones and the divines of empty ritual have joined together [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان حقیقی شما آگاهید که در ایران حاسدان و علمای رسوم بهم پیوستند
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @Ottoman commissions of investigation, @unity; oneness of humanity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
